zh.lifeSummary: 當Lucy Brett於大約1275年出生在英國薩默塞特時，她的父親Adam le Brett31歲，母親De Corypoole-3歲。她於大約1288年與Hugh Vautort在英國結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1320年之前在英國。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lucy Brett于大约1275年出生在英国薩默塞特时，她的父亲Adam le Brett31岁，母亲De Corypoole-3岁。她于大约1288年与Hugh Vautort在英国结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1320年之前在英国。

nameMeanings.name: Brett
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (West Midlands): from Middle English brat ‘cloak of coarse cloth’ (Old English bratt), possibly denoting a maker or habitual wearer of such garments. Alternatively, perhaps a variant of Brett .
Swedish and Norwegian: from the Old Norse personal name Brattr meaning ‘majestic, proud’ (also, of places, ‘steep’). See also Bradt .

variants.name: Bradt
meanings: German: from the ancient Germanic personal name Brado, of unexplained etymology.
History: Albert Andriessen Bradt (1607–1686), a settler in Rensselaerswyck on the upper Hudson River, was of Norwegian origin, from Fredrikstad, Norway. See also   Norman   and   Vanderzee  .

variants.name: Brad
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Romanian Anca, Vasile.
English: perhaps a variant of   Bratt  .

nameMeanings.name: Lucy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Old French Lucie, the vernacular form of Lucia . It is sometimes assumed that Lucy is a pet form of Lucinda , but there is no etymological justification for this assumption. It was in fairly widespread use in the Middle Ages, and increased greatly in popularity in the 18th century and again in the 1990s. In Ireland it serves as an Anglicized form of Irish Luíseach .

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Lucy Brett was born about 1275, in Somerset, England, her father, Adam le Brett, was 31 and her mother, De Corypoole, was -3. She married Hugh Vautort about 1288, in England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 5 daughters. She died before 1320, in England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lucy Brett est née environ 1275, à Somerset, Angleterre, son père, Adam le Brett, avait 31 ans et sa mère, De Corypoole, avait -3 ans. Elle a épousé Hugh Vautort environ 1288, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée avant 1320, à Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lucy Brett um 1275 in Somerset, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Adam le Brett 31 und ihre Mutter De Corypoole -3. Sie hat um 1288 in England Hugh Vautort geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb vor 1320 in England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lucy Brett è nata il circa 1275 nel Somerset, England, sua padre, Adam le Brett, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, De Corypoole, aveva -3 anni. Lei sposato Hugh Vautort circa 1288, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 5 figlie. Morì prima del 1320, nel England.

ja.lifeSummary: Lucy Brettが約1275年にイギリスソメルセトで生まれた時，父Adam le Brettは31歳，母De Corypooleは-3歳であった。約1288年にイギリスでHugh Vautortと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1320年以前にイギリスで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lucy Brett(이)가 대략 1275년 영국 서머세트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Adam le Brett(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 De Corypoole(은)는 -3세였다. 그녀는 대략 1288년 영국에서 Hugh Vautort(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1320년 이전 영국에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lucy Brett nasceu aproximadamente 1275, em Somerset, Inglaterra, seu pai, Adam le Brett, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, De Corypoole, tinha -3 anos. Ela casou-se com Hugh Vautort aproximadamente 1288, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu antes 1320, em Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lucy Brett родилась около 1275 г. в местности сомирсет, Англия, её отцу по имени Adam le Brett было 31 год, а матери, которую звали De Corypoole, -3. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Hugh Vautort около 1288 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 5 дочерей. Она умерла перед 1320 г. в местности Англия.
